fields.localRole: token generation confirmation; token value is intentionally not returned

tools.note: Local team-key JWT workflow, not an App Store Connect REST operation. It creates or reuses a cached ES256 token with a 20-minute lifetime and does not expose the token; individual API-key scope and long-lived individual-key tokens are not supported.

fields.localRole: cache invalidation and token regeneration confirmation

tools.note: Local cache invalidation and team-key JWT regeneration; no Apple REST operation is called and the refreshed token is not returned.
Local in-memory cache inspection only. Validity means the cached token's decoded exp claim is beyond the configured refresh leeway; it is not server-side Apple validation.

fields.localRole: JWT compact serialization validated against the configured team key and company claims
combined format, ES256 signature, header, company claim, issued-at, standard lifetime, and expiration result
configured_team_key identifies the local trust boundary
always false because no Apple request is made
stable local reason code, present only when validation fails

tools.note: Performs local cryptographic validation for the configured non-scoped team-key contract using the private key's public key. It checks alg=ES256, typ=JWT, kid, iss, aud=appstoreconnect-v1, iat ordering, exp-iat at most 1200 seconds, and exp beyond the refresh leeway. It intentionally rejects long-lived scoped JWTs, does not call Apple, does not evaluate endpoint role permissions, does not support individual-key JWTs, and does not prove server acceptance.
